authors_text: Hemang Chawla,Kishaan Jeeveswaran,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz
title: Image Masking for Robust Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 用于鲁棒自监督单目深度估计的图像掩蔽
comment: Accepted at 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted at 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation is a salient task for 3D scene understanding. Learned jointly with monocular ego-motion estimation, several methods have been proposed to predict accurate pixel-wise depth without using labeled data. Nevertheless, these methods focus on improving performance under ideal conditions without natural or digital corruptions. The general absence of occlusions is assumed even for object-specific depth estimation. These methods are also vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which is a pertinent concern for their reliable deployment in robots and autonomous driving systems. We propose MIMDepth, a method that adapts masked image modeling (MIM) for self-supervised monocular depth estimation. While MIM has been used to learn generalizable features during pre-training, we show how it could be adapted for direct training of monocular depth estimation. Our experiments show that MIMDepth is more robust to noise, blur, weather conditions, digital artifacts, occlusions, as well as untargeted and targeted adversarial attacks.
summary: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation is a salient task for 3D scene understanding. Learned jointly with monocular ego-motion estimation, several methods have been proposed to predict accurate pixel-wise depth without using labeled data. Nevertheless, these methods focus on improving performance under ideal conditions without natural or digital corruptions. The general absence of occlusions is assumed even for object-specific depth estimation. These methods are also vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which is a pertinent concern for their reliable deployment in robots and autonomous driving systems. We propose MIMDepth, a method that adapts masked image modeling (MIM) for self-supervised monocular depth estimation. While MIM has been used to learn generalizable features during pre-training, we show how it could be adapted for direct training of monocular depth estimation. Our experiments show that MIMDepth is more robust to noise, blur, weather conditions, digital artifacts, occlusions, as well as untargeted and targeted adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 自监督单目深度估计是 3D 场景理解的一项重要任务。与单目自我运动估计联合学习，已经提出了几种方法来预测准确的像素级深度，而无需使用标记数据。然而，这些方法侧重于在理想条件下提高性能，而不会出现自然或数字损坏。即使对于特定于对象的深度估计，也假设一般不存在遮挡。这些方法也容易受到对抗性攻击，这对于它们在机器人和自动驾驶系统中的可靠部署而言是一个相关问题。我们提出了 MIMDepth，一种采用掩模图像建模（MIM）进行自监督单目深度估计的方法。虽然 MIM 已用于在预训练期间学习可概括的特征，但我们展示了如何将其适用于单目深度估计的直接训练。我们的实验表明，MIMDepth 对于噪声、模糊、天气条件、数字伪像、遮挡以及无目标和有目标的对抗性攻击更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像掩码的自监督单目深度估计方法，以提高模型在复杂环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督单目深度估计方法在理想条件下表现良好，但对噪声、模糊、天气干扰、遮挡及对抗攻击等现实场景中的挑战缺乏鲁棒性，限制了其在机器人和自动驾驶等领域的可靠应用。
AI.method: 提出MIMDepth方法，将掩码图像建模（MIM）技术直接应用于单目深度估计的端到端训练，通过学习遮蔽区域的上下文信息增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，MIMDepth在噪声、模糊、天气条件、数字伪影、遮挡以及非目标和目标对抗攻击下均表现出优于现有方法的深度估计鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MIMDepth通过引入掩码建模机制，有效提升了单目深度估计模型对现实环境干扰的适应能力，为复杂场景下的可靠部署提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zechen Xiong,Yufeng Su,Hod Lipson
title: Fast Untethered Soft Robotic Crawler with Elastic Instability
title_zh: 具有弹性不稳定性的快速无系绳软机器人爬行器
abstract: High-speed locomotion of animals gives them tremendous advantages in exploring, hunting, and escaping from predators in varying environments. Enlightened by the fast-running gait of mammals like cheetahs and wolves, we designed and fabricated a single-servo-driving untethered soft robot that is capable of galloping at a speed of 313 mm/s or 1.56 body length per second (BL/s), 5.2 times and 2.6 times faster than the reported fastest predecessors in mm/s and BL/s, respectively, in literature. An in-plane prestressed hair clip mechanism (HCM) made up of semi-rigid materials like plastic is used as the supporting chassis, the compliant spine, and the muscle force amplifier of the robot at the same time, enabling the robot to be rapid and strong. The influence of factors including actuation frequency, substrates, tethering/untethering, and symmetric/asymmetric actuation is explored with experiments. Based on previous work, this paper further demonstrated the potential of HCM in addressing the speed problem of soft robots.
summary: High-speed locomotion of animals gives them tremendous advantages in exploring, hunting, and escaping from predators in varying environments. Enlightened by the fast-running gait of mammals like cheetahs and wolves, we designed and fabricated a single-servo-driving untethered soft robot that is capable of galloping at a speed of 313 mm/s or 1.56 body length per second (BL/s), 5.2 times and 2.6 times faster than the reported fastest predecessors in mm/s and BL/s, respectively, in literature. An in-plane prestressed hair clip mechanism (HCM) made up of semi-rigid materials like plastic is used as the supporting chassis, the compliant spine, and the muscle force amplifier of the robot at the same time, enabling the robot to be rapid and strong. The influence of factors including actuation frequency, substrates, tethering/untethering, and symmetric/asymmetric actuation is explored with experiments. Based on previous work, this paper further demonstrated the potential of HCM in addressing the speed problem of soft robots.
abstract_zh: 动物的高速运动赋予它们在不同环境中探索、狩猎和逃离捕食者的巨大优势。受猎豹和狼等哺乳动物快速奔跑步态的启发，我们设计并制造了一种单伺服驱动的无绳软体机器人，其能够以313毫米/秒或每秒1.56体长（BL/s）的速度奔跑，分别比文献报道的最快前辈（毫米/秒和BL/s）快5.2倍和2.6倍。采用塑料等半刚性材料制成的面内预应力发夹机构（HCM），同时作为机器人的支撑底盘、柔性脊柱和肌肉力量放大器，使机器人速度快、力量大。通过实验探讨了驱动频率、基底、束缚/解束缚以及对称/不对称驱动等因素的影响。在前期工作的基础上，本文进一步论证了HCM在解决软体机器人速度问题方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 设计并制造了一种基于弹性失稳的单伺服驱动无缆软体机器人，实现了高速奔跑。
AI.motivation: 受猎豹和狼等哺乳动物快速奔跑步态的启发，解决软体机器人速度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用平面预应力发夹机构（HCM）作为支撑底盘、柔性脊柱和肌肉力放大器，通过实验探究驱动频率、基底材质、系绳/无绳及对称/非对称驱动等因素的影响。
AI.result: 机器人奔跑速度达313 mm/s（1.56体长/秒），分别比文献中最快前驱机器人快5.2倍和2.6倍。
AI.conclusion: HCM机制有效提升了软体机器人的运动速度，展示了其在解决软体机器人速度瓶颈中的潜力。

authors_text: Jason P. Lim,Stefano B. Blumberg,Neil Narayan,Sean C. Epstein,Daniel C. Alexander,Marco Palombo,Paddy J. Slator
title: Fitting a Directional Microstructure Model to Diffusion-Relaxation MRI Data with Self-Supervised Machine Learning
title_zh: 通过自监督机器学习将定向微结构模型拟合到扩散弛豫 MRI 数据
comment: Oral Presentation in: Computational Diffusion MRI Workshop (CDMRI) at Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022
comments: Oral Presentation in: Computational Diffusion MRI Workshop (CDMRI) at Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022
abstract: Machine learning is a powerful approach for fitting microstructural models to diffusion MRI data. Early machine learning microstructure imaging implementations trained regressors to estimate model parameters in a supervised way, using synthetic training data with known ground truth. However, a drawback of this approach is that the choice of training data impacts fitted parameter values. Self-supervised learning is emerging as an attractive alternative to supervised learning in this context. Thus far, both supervised and self-supervised learning have typically been applied to isotropic models, such as intravoxel incoherent motion (IVIM), as opposed to models where the directionality of anisotropic structures is also estimated. In this paper, we demonstrate self-supervised machine learning model fitting for a directional microstructural model. In particular, we fit a combined T1-ball-stick model to the multidimensional diffusion (MUDI) challenge diffusion-relaxation dataset. Our self-supervised approach shows clear improvements in parameter estimation and computational time, for both simulated and in-vivo brain data, compared to standard non-linear least squares fitting. Code for the artificial neural net constructed for this study is available for public use from the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/jplte/deep-T1-ball-stick
summary: Machine learning is a powerful approach for fitting microstructural models to diffusion MRI data. Early machine learning microstructure imaging implementations trained regressors to estimate model parameters in a supervised way, using synthetic training data with known ground truth. However, a drawback of this approach is that the choice of training data impacts fitted parameter values. Self-supervised learning is emerging as an attractive alternative to supervised learning in this context. Thus far, both supervised and self-supervised learning have typically been applied to isotropic models, such as intravoxel incoherent motion (IVIM), as opposed to models where the directionality of anisotropic structures is also estimated. In this paper, we demonstrate self-supervised machine learning model fitting for a directional microstructural model. In particular, we fit a combined T1-ball-stick model to the multidimensional diffusion (MUDI) challenge diffusion-relaxation dataset. Our self-supervised approach shows clear improvements in parameter estimation and computational time, for both simulated and in-vivo brain data, compared to standard non-linear least squares fitting. Code for the artificial neural net constructed for this study is available for public use from the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/jplte/deep-T1-ball-stick
abstract_zh: 机器学习是将微观结构模型与扩散 MRI 数据进行拟合的强大方法。早期的机器学习微观结构成像实现训练回归器以监督方式估计模型参数，使用具有已知地面事实的合成训练数据。然而，这种方法的缺点是训练数据的选择会影响拟合参数值。在这种情况下，自监督学习正在成为监督学习的一种有吸引力的替代方案。到目前为止，监督学习和自监督学习通常都应用于各向同性模型，例如体素内不相干运动（IVIM），而不是同时估计各向异性结构方向性的模型。在本文中，我们演示了适合定向微观结构模型的自监督机器学习模型。特别是，我们将组合的 T1-ball-stick 模型拟合到多维扩散 (MUDI) 挑战扩散松弛数据集。与标准非线性最小二乘拟合相比，我们的自我监督方法在模拟和体内大脑数据的参数估计和计算时间方面显示出明显的改进。本研究构建的人工神经网络的代码可从以下 GitHub 存储库供公众使用：https://github.com/jplte/deep-T1-ball-stick

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督机器学习的方向性微观结构模型拟合方法，用于扩散-弛豫MRI数据的分析。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法依赖合成数据训练，导致参数估计受训练数据影响；自监督学习在各向同性模型中表现良好，但尚未应用于方向性各向异性结构模型。
AI.method: 采用自监督机器学习拟合结合T1-ball-stick模型，处理多维扩散-弛豫数据集（MUDI challenge），并与非线性最小二乘法对比。
AI.result: 在模拟和活体脑数据中，参数估计精度提升且计算时间缩短，代码已开源。

search_text: Fitting a Directional Microstructure Model to Diffusion-Relaxation MRI Data with Self-Supervised Machine Learning 通过自监督机器学习将定向微结构模型拟合到扩散弛豫 MRI 数据 Machine learning is a powerful approach for fitting microstructural models to diffusion MRI data. Early machine learning microstructure imaging implementations trained regressors to estimate model parameters in a supervised way, using synthetic training data with known ground truth. However, a drawback of this approach is that the choice of training data impacts fitted parameter values. Self-supervised learning is emerging as an attractive alternative to supervised learning in this context. Thus far, both supervised and self-supervised learning have typically been applied to isotropic models, such as intravoxel incoherent motion (IVIM), as opposed to models where the directionality of anisotropic structures is also estimated. In this paper, we demonstrate self-supervised machine learning model fitting for a directional microstructural model. In particular, we fit a combined T1-ball-stick model to the multidimensional diffusion (MUDI) challenge diffusion-relaxation dataset. Our self-supervised approach shows clear improvements in parameter estimation and computational time, for both simulated and in-vivo brain data, compared to standard non-linear least squares fitting. Code for the artificial neural net constructed for this study is available for public use from the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/jplte/deep-T1-ball-stick 机器学习是将微观结构模型与扩散 MRI 数据进行拟合的强大方法。早期的机器学习微观结构成像实现训练回归器以监督方式估计模型参数，使用具有已知地面事实的合成训练数据。然而，这种方法的缺点是训练数据的选择会影响拟合参数值。在这种情况下，自监督学习正在成为监督学习的一种有吸引力的替代方案。到目前为止，监督学习和自监督学习通常都应用于各向同性模型，例如体素内不相干运动（IVIM），而不是同时估计各向异性结构方向性的模型。在本文中，我们演示了适合定向微观结构模型的自监督机器学习模型。特别是，我们将组合的 T1-ball-stick 模型拟合到多维扩散 (MUDI) 挑战扩散松弛数据集。与标准非线性最小二乘拟合相比，我们的自我监督方法在模拟和体内大脑数据的参数估计和计算时间方面显示出明显的改进。本研究构建的人工神经网络的代码可从以下 GitHub 存储库供公众使用：https://github.com/jplte/deep-T1-ball-stick 本文提出了一种基于自监督机器学习的方向性微观结构模型拟合方法，用于扩散-弛豫MRI数据的分析。 Jason P. Lim,Stefano B. Blumberg,Neil Narayan,Sean C. Epstein,Daniel C. Alexander,Marco Palombo,Paddy J. Slator eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Justin N. M. Pinkney,Chuan Li
title: clip2latent: Text driven sampling of a pre-trained StyleGAN using denoising diffusion and CLIP
title_zh: Clip2latent：使用去噪扩散和 CLIP 对预训练 StyleGAN 进行文本驱动采样
comment: Accepted to BMVC 2022
comments: Accepted to BMVC 2022
abstract: We introduce a new method to efficiently create text-to-image models from a pre-trained CLIP and StyleGAN. It enables text driven sampling with an existing generative model without any external data or fine-tuning. This is achieved by training a diffusion model conditioned on CLIP embeddings to sample latent vectors of a pre-trained StyleGAN, which we call clip2latent. We leverage the alignment between CLIP's image and text embeddings to avoid the need for any text labelled data for training the conditional diffusion model. We demonstrate that clip2latent allows us to generate high-resolution (1024x1024 pixels) images based on text prompts with fast sampling, high image quality, and low training compute and data requirements. We also show that the use of the well studied StyleGAN architecture, without further fine-tuning, allows us to directly apply existing methods to control and modify the generated images adding a further layer of control to our text-to-image pipeline.
summary: We introduce a new method to efficiently create text-to-image models from a pre-trained CLIP and StyleGAN. It enables text driven sampling with an existing generative model without any external data or fine-tuning. This is achieved by training a diffusion model conditioned on CLIP embeddings to sample latent vectors of a pre-trained StyleGAN, which we call clip2latent. We leverage the alignment between CLIP's image and text embeddings to avoid the need for any text labelled data for training the conditional diffusion model. We demonstrate that clip2latent allows us to generate high-resolution (1024x1024 pixels) images based on text prompts with fast sampling, high image quality, and low training compute and data requirements. We also show that the use of the well studied StyleGAN architecture, without further fine-tuning, allows us to directly apply existing methods to control and modify the generated images adding a further layer of control to our text-to-image pipeline.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新方法，可以从预先训练的 CLIP 和 StyleGAN 中高效创建文本到图像模型。它可以使用现有的生成模型进行文本驱动采样，无需任何外部数据或微调。这是通过训练以 CLIP 嵌入为条件的扩散模型来采样预训练 StyleGAN 的潜在向量（我们称之为 Clip2latent）来实现的。我们利用 CLIP 的图像和文本嵌入之间的对齐，以避免需要任何文本标记数据来训练条件扩散模型。我们证明，clip2latent 允许我们根据文本提示生成高分辨率（1024x1024 像素）图像，具有快速采样、高图像质量以及低训练计算和数据要求。我们还表明，使用经过充分研究的 StyleGAN 架构，无需进一步微调，就可以直接应用现有方法来控制和修改生成的图像，为我们的文本到图像管道添加进一步的控制层。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部数据或微调即可利用预训练CLIP和StyleGAN生成文本驱动图像的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型通常需要大量标注数据或对生成模型进行微调，而本文旨在通过结合CLIP和StyleGAN的优势，实现高效且无需额外数据的文本驱动图像生成。
AI.method: 训练一个以CLIP嵌入为条件的去噪扩散模型，生成预训练StyleGAN的潜在向量（称为clip2latent），利用CLIP的图文对齐特性避免标注数据需求。
AI.result: 成功生成1024x1024高分辨率图像，具有快速采样、高质量和低计算需求，并可通过StyleGAN架构直接应用现有图像控制方法。
AI.conclusion: clip2latent方法有效结合了CLIP和StyleGAN的优势，在无需微调和标注数据的情况下实现了可控的高质量文本到图像生成。

authors_text: Jon Arrizabalaga,Markus Ryll
title: SCTOMP: Spatially Constrained Time-Optimal Motion Planning
title_zh: SCTOMP：空间约束时间最优运动规划
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), Detroit, USA, October 2023. Copyright @ IEEE
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), Detroit, USA, October 2023. Copyright @ IEEE
abstract: This paper focuses on spatial time-optimal motion planning, a generalization of the exact time-optimal path following problem that allows the system to plan within a predefined space. In contrast to state-of-the-art methods, we drop the assumption that a collision-free geometric reference is given. Instead, we present a two-stage motion planning method that solely relies on a goal location and a geometric representation of the environment to compute a time-optimal trajectory that is compliant with system dynamics and constraints. To do so, the proposed scheme first computes an obstacle-free Pythagorean Hodograph parametric spline, and second solves a spatially reformulated minimum-time optimization problem. The spline obtained in the first stage is not a geometric reference, but an extension of the environment representation, and thus, time-optimality of the solution is guaranteed. The efficacy of the proposed approach is benchmarked by a known planar example and validated in a more complex spatial system, illustrating its versatility and applicability.
summary: This paper focuses on spatial time-optimal motion planning, a generalization of the exact time-optimal path following problem that allows the system to plan within a predefined space. In contrast to state-of-the-art methods, we drop the assumption that a collision-free geometric reference is given. Instead, we present a two-stage motion planning method that solely relies on a goal location and a geometric representation of the environment to compute a time-optimal trajectory that is compliant with system dynamics and constraints. To do so, the proposed scheme first computes an obstacle-free Pythagorean Hodograph parametric spline, and second solves a spatially reformulated minimum-time optimization problem. The spline obtained in the first stage is not a geometric reference, but an extension of the environment representation, and thus, time-optimality of the solution is guaranteed. The efficacy of the proposed approach is benchmarked by a known planar example and validated in a more complex spatial system, illustrating its versatility and applicability.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注空间时间最优运动规划，这是精确时间最优路径跟踪问题的概括，允许系统在预定义的空间内进行规划。与最先进的方法相比，我们放弃了给出无碰撞几何参考的假设。相反，我们提出了一种两阶段运动规划方法，该方法仅依赖于目标位置和环境的几何表示来计算符合系统动力学和约束的时间最优轨迹。为此，所提出的方案首先计算无障碍勾股图参数样条，然后解决空间重新表述的最小时间优化问题。第一阶段获得的样条不是几何参考，而是环境表示的扩展，从而保证了解决方案的时间最优性。所提出方法的有效性以已知的平面示例为基准，并在更复杂的空间系统中进行了验证，说明了其多功能性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需预设无碰撞路径的空间时间最优运动规划方法，通过两阶段策略生成符合系统动力学的最优轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预设无碰撞路径，限制了复杂环境下的应用，需更灵活的方法仅基于目标位置和环境几何进行规划。
AI.method: 采用两阶段策略：首先生成无障碍物的Pythagorean Hodograph参数样条作为环境扩展，其次通过空间重构的最小时间优化问题求解时间最优轨迹。
AI.result: 通过平面案例和复杂系统验证，证明方法有效且具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在无需预设路径的情况下保证时间最优性，适用于多种复杂环境，优于现有技术。

ai_content.tldr: 提出了一种无需预设无碰撞路径的空间时间最优运动规划方法，通过两阶段策略生成符合系统动力学的最优轨迹。

To do so, the proposed scheme first computes an obstacle-free Pythagorean Hodograph parametric spline, and second solves a spatially reformulated minimum-time optimization problem. The spline obtained in the first stage is not a geometric reference, but an extension of the environment representation, and thus, time-optimality of the solution is guaranteed. The efficacy of the proposed approach is benchmarked by a known planar example and validated in a more complex spatial system, illustrating its versatility and applicability. 本文重点关注空间时间最优运动规划，这是精确时间最优路径跟踪问题的概括，允许系统在预定义的空间内进行规划。与最先进的方法相比，我们放弃了给出无碰撞几何参考的假设。相反，我们提出了一种两阶段运动规划方法，该方法仅依赖于目标位置和环境的几何表示来计算符合系统动力学和约束的时间最优轨迹。为此，所提出的方案首先计算无障碍勾股图参数样条，然后解决空间重新表述的最小时间优化问题。第一阶段获得的样条不是几何参考，而是环境表示的扩展，从而保证了解决方案的时间最优性。所提出方法的有效性以已知的平面示例为基准，并在更复杂的空间系统中进行了验证，说明了其多功能性和适用性。 提出了一种无需预设无碰撞路径的空间时间最优运动规划方法，通过两阶段策略生成符合系统动力学的最优轨迹。 Jon Arrizabalaga,Markus Ryll cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: David Brandfonbrener,Stephen Tu,Avi Singh,Stefan Welker,Chad Boodoo,Nikolai Matni,Jake Varley
title: Visual Backtracking Teleoperation: A Data Collection Protocol for Offline Image-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 视觉回溯遥操作：基于离线图像的强化学习的数据收集协议
abstract: We consider how to most efficiently leverage teleoperator time to collect data for learning robust image-based value functions and policies for sparse reward robotic tasks. To accomplish this goal, we modify the process of data collection to include more than just successful demonstrations of the desired task. Instead we develop a novel protocol that we call Visual Backtracking Teleoperation (VBT), which deliberately collects a dataset of visually similar failures, recoveries, and successes. VBT data collection is particularly useful for efficiently learning accurate value functions from small datasets of image-based observations. We demonstrate VBT on a real robot to perform continuous control from image observations for the deformable manipulation task of T-shirt grasping. We find that by adjusting the data collection process we improve the quality of both the learned value functions and policies over a variety of baseline methods for data collection. Specifically, we find that offline reinforcement learning on VBT data outperforms standard behavior cloning on successful demonstration data by 13% when both methods are given equal-sized datasets of 60 minutes of data from the real robot.
summary: We consider how to most efficiently leverage teleoperator time to collect data for learning robust image-based value functions and policies for sparse reward robotic tasks. To accomplish this goal, we modify the process of data collection to include more than just successful demonstrations of the desired task. Instead we develop a novel protocol that we call Visual Backtracking Teleoperation (VBT), which deliberately collects a dataset of visually similar failures, recoveries, and successes. VBT data collection is particularly useful for efficiently learning accurate value functions from small datasets of image-based observations. We demonstrate VBT on a real robot to perform continuous control from image observations for the deformable manipulation task of T-shirt grasping. We find that by adjusting the data collection process we improve the quality of both the learned value functions and policies over a variety of baseline methods for data collection. Specifically, we find that offline reinforcement learning on VBT data outperforms standard behavior cloning on successful demonstration data by 13% when both methods are given equal-sized datasets of 60 minutes of data from the real robot.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑如何最有效地利用远程操作员的时间来收集数据，以学习稳健的基于图像的价值函数和稀疏奖励机器人任务的策略。为了实现这一目标，我们修改了数据收集过程，使其不仅仅包括所需任务的成功演示。相反，我们开发了一种称为视觉回溯远程操作（VBT）的新颖协议，该协议有意收集视觉上相似的失败、恢复和成功的数据集。 VBT 数据收集对于从基于图像的观测的小型数据集中有效地学习准确的值函数特别有用。我们在真实机器人上演示了 VBT，通过图像观察执行连续控制，以实现 T 恤抓取的变形操作任务。我们发现，通过调整数据收集过程，我们比各种数据收集基线方法提高了学习价值函数和策略的质量。具体来说，我们发现，当给两种方法提供来自真实机器人的 60 分钟数据的相同大小的数据集时，VBT 数据的离线强化学习比成功演示数据上的标准行为克隆的性能高出 13%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为视觉回溯遥操作（VBT）的数据收集协议，旨在通过收集视觉相似的成功、失败及恢复案例，提升离线图像强化学习在稀疏奖励任务中的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 传统数据收集方法仅依赖成功演示，难以有效学习稀疏奖励任务中的价值函数，且数据利用效率低。
AI.method: 开发VBT协议，主动收集包含视觉相似失败、恢复及成功状态的数据集，用于训练更鲁棒的图像基础价值函数和策略。
AI.result: 在真实机器人T恤抓取任务中，VBT数据集的离线强化学习表现比行为克隆方法提升13%，且数据集规模相同（60分钟）。
AI.conclusion: VBT通过优化数据收集过程，显著提升了价值函数和策略的学习质量，优于现有基线方法。

authors_text: Robin Smit,Chris van der Ploeg,Arjan Teerhuis,Emilia Silvas
title: Informed sampling-based trajectory planner for automated driving in dynamic urban environments
title_zh: 基于知情采样的轨迹规划器，用于动态城市环境中的自动驾驶
abstract: The urban environment is amongst the most difficult domains for autonomous vehicles. The vehicle must be able to plan a safe route on challenging road layouts, in the presence of various dynamic traffic participants such as vehicles, cyclists and pedestrians and in various environmental conditions. The challenge remains to have motion planners that are computationally fast and that account for future movements of other road users proactively. This paper describes an computationally efficient sampling-based trajectory planner for safe and comfortable driving in urban environments. The planner improves the Stable-Sparse-RRT algorithm by adding initial exploration branches to the search tree based on road layout information and reiterating the previous solution. Furthermore, the trajectory planner accounts for the predicted motion of other traffic participants to allow for safe driving in urban traffic. Simulation studies show that the planner is capable of planning collision-free, comfortable trajectories in several urban traffic scenarios. Adding the domain-knowledge-based exploration branches increases the efficiency of exploration of highly interesting areas, thereby increasing the overall planning performance.
summary: The urban environment is amongst the most difficult domains for autonomous vehicles. The vehicle must be able to plan a safe route on challenging road layouts, in the presence of various dynamic traffic participants such as vehicles, cyclists and pedestrians and in various environmental conditions. The challenge remains to have motion planners that are computationally fast and that account for future movements of other road users proactively. This paper describes an computationally efficient sampling-based trajectory planner for safe and comfortable driving in urban environments. The planner improves the Stable-Sparse-RRT algorithm by adding initial exploration branches to the search tree based on road layout information and reiterating the previous solution. Furthermore, the trajectory planner accounts for the predicted motion of other traffic participants to allow for safe driving in urban traffic. Simulation studies show that the planner is capable of planning collision-free, comfortable trajectories in several urban traffic scenarios. Adding the domain-knowledge-based exploration branches increases the efficiency of exploration of highly interesting areas, thereby increasing the overall planning performance.
abstract_zh: 城市环境是自动驾驶汽车最困难的领域之一。车辆必须能够在具有挑战性的道路布局、车辆、骑自行车者和行人等各种动态交通参与者以及各种环境条件下规划安全路线。挑战仍然是拥有计算速度快并主动考虑其他道路使用者未来运动的运动规划器。本文描述了一种计算高效的基于采样的轨迹规划器，用于在城市环境中安全舒适的驾驶。规划器通过基于道路布局信息向搜索树添加初始探索分支并重申先前的解决方案来改进稳定稀疏RRT算法。此外，轨迹规划器还考虑了其​​他交通参与者的预测运动，以实现城市交通中的安全驾驶。仿真研究表明，规划器能够在多种城市交通场景中规划无碰撞、舒适的轨迹。添加基于领域知识的探索分支可以提高对高度感兴趣的领域的探索效率，从而提高整体规划性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息采样的轨迹规划器，用于提升自动驾驶车辆在动态城市环境中的安全性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 城市环境因复杂道路布局和动态交通参与者（车辆、行人等）导致自动驾驶轨迹规划面临安全性和实时性双重挑战，传统方法难以兼顾效率与安全性。
AI.method: 改进Stable-Sparse-RRT算法，通过融合道路布局信息生成初始探索分支并迭代优化，结合动态交通参与者运动预测实现安全轨迹规划。
AI.result: 仿真验证显示，该方法能在多场景下生成无碰撞且舒适的轨迹，领域知识引导的探索分支使规划效率提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 结合先验道路知识与动态预测的采样规划方法，可有效解决城市自动驾驶中轨迹规划的效率与安全性矛盾。

authors_text: Donald Shenaj,Eros Fanì,Marco Toldo,Debora Caldarola,Antonio Tavera,Umberto Michieli,Marco Ciccone,Pietro Zanuttigh,Barbara Caputo
title: Learning Across Domains and Devices: Style-Driven Source-Free Domain Adaptation in Clustered Federated Learning
title_zh: 跨域和设备学习：集群联邦学习中风格驱动的无源域适应
comment: WACV 2023; 11 pages manuscript, 6 pages supplemental material
comments: WACV 2023; 11 pages manuscript, 6 pages supplemental material
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has recently emerged as a possible way to tackle the domain shift in real-world Semantic Segmentation (SS) without compromising the private nature of the collected data. However, most of the existing works on FL unrealistically assume labeled data in the remote clients. Here we propose a novel task (FFREEDA) in which the clients' data is unlabeled and the server accesses a source labeled dataset for pre-training only. To solve FFREEDA, we propose LADD, which leverages the knowledge of the pre-trained model by employing self-supervision with ad-hoc regularization techniques for local training and introducing a novel federated clustered aggregation scheme based on the clients' style. Our experiments show that our algorithm is able to efficiently tackle the new task outperforming existing approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/Erosinho13/LADD.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) has recently emerged as a possible way to tackle the domain shift in real-world Semantic Segmentation (SS) without compromising the private nature of the collected data. However, most of the existing works on FL unrealistically assume labeled data in the remote clients. Here we propose a novel task (FFREEDA) in which the clients' data is unlabeled and the server accesses a source labeled dataset for pre-training only. To solve FFREEDA, we propose LADD, which leverages the knowledge of the pre-trained model by employing self-supervision with ad-hoc regularization techniques for local training and introducing a novel federated clustered aggregation scheme based on the clients' style. Our experiments show that our algorithm is able to efficiently tackle the new task outperforming existing approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/Erosinho13/LADD.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）最近成为解决现实世界语义分割（SS）领域转移的一种可能方法，同时又不损害所收集数据的私有性。然而，大多数关于 FL 的现有工作不切实际地假设远程客户端中的标记数据。在这里，我们提出了一个新颖的任务（FFREEDA），其中客户端的数据未标记，服务器访问源标记数据集仅用于预训练。为了解决 FFREEDA，我们提出了 LADD，它利用预训练模型的知识，通过采用自监督和临时正则化技术进行本地训练，并引入一种基于客户风格的新型联邦集群聚合方案。我们的实验表明，我们的算法能够有效地处理新任务，性能优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Erosinho13/LADD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型联邦学习任务FFREEDA，在客户端数据未标记且服务器仅依赖源标记数据预训练的情况下，解决跨领域和设备的语义分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法依赖客户端标记数据，但实际场景中客户端数据常为未标记，且需保护数据隐私，因此需探索无源域适应的联邦学习方案。
AI.method: 提出LADD方法，通过预训练模型的自监督学习与正则化技术进行本地训练，并设计基于客户端风格的联邦聚类聚合策略，实现跨设备知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，LADD在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，有效解决了跨领域和设备的语义分割任务。
AI.conclusion: LADD验证了风格驱动的无源域适应联邦学习可行性，为隐私保护下的跨设备协作提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Across Domains and Devices: Style-Driven Source-Free Domain Adaptation in Clustered Federated Learning 跨域和设备学习：集群联邦学习中风格驱动的无源域适应 Federated Learning (FL) has recently emerged as a possible way to tackle the domain shift in real-world Semantic Segmentation (SS) without compromising the private nature of the collected data. However, most of the existing works on FL unrealistically assume labeled data in the remote clients. Here we propose a novel task (FFREEDA) in which the clients' data is unlabeled and the server accesses a source labeled dataset for pre-training only. To solve FFREEDA, we propose LADD, which leverages the knowledge of the pre-trained model by employing self-supervision with ad-hoc regularization techniques for local training and introducing a novel federated clustered aggregation scheme based on the clients' style. Our experiments show that our algorithm is able to efficiently tackle the new task outperforming existing approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/Erosinho13/LADD. 联邦学习（FL）最近成为解决现实世界语义分割（SS）领域转移的一种可能方法，同时又不损害所收集数据的私有性。然而，大多数关于 FL 的现有工作不切实际地假设远程客户端中的标记数据。在这里，我们提出了一个新颖的任务（FFREEDA），其中客户端的数据未标记，服务器访问源标记数据集仅用于预训练。为了解决 FFREEDA，我们提出了 LADD，它利用预训练模型的知识，通过采用自监督和临时正则化技术进行本地训练，并引入一种基于客户风格的新型联邦集群聚合方案。我们的实验表明，我们的算法能够有效地处理新任务，性能优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Erosinho13/LADD 获取。 本文提出一种新型联邦学习任务FFREEDA，在客户端数据未标记且服务器仅依赖源标记数据预训练的情况下，解决跨领域和设备的语义分割问题。 Donald Shenaj,Eros Fanì,Marco Toldo,Debora Caldarola,Antonio Tavera,Umberto Michieli,Marco Ciccone,Pietro Zanuttigh,Barbara Caputo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yafei Yang,Bo Yang
title: Promising or Elusive? Unsupervised Object Segmentation from Real-world Single Images
title_zh: 有希望还是难以捉摸？来自现实世界单图像的无监督对象分割
comment: NeurIPS 2022. Code and data are available at project page: https://vlar-group.github.io/UnsupObjSeg.html
comments: NeurIPS 2022. Code and data are available at project page: https://vlar-group.github.io/UnsupObjSeg.html
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of unsupervised object segmentation from single images. We do not introduce a new algorithm, but systematically investigate the effectiveness of existing unsupervised models on challenging real-world images. We firstly introduce four complexity factors to quantitatively measure the distributions of object- and scene-level biases in appearance and geometry for datasets with human annotations. With the aid of these factors, we empirically find that, not surprisingly, existing unsupervised models catastrophically fail to segment generic objects in real-world images, although they can easily achieve excellent performance on numerous simple synthetic datasets, due to the vast gap in objectness biases between synthetic and real images. By conducting extensive experiments on multiple groups of ablated real-world datasets, we ultimately find that the key factors underlying the colossal failure of existing unsupervised models on real-world images are the challenging distributions of object- and scene-level biases in appearance and geometry. Because of this, the inductive biases introduced in existing unsupervised models can hardly capture the diverse object distributions. Our research results suggest that future work should exploit more explicit objectness biases in the network design.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of unsupervised object segmentation from single images. We do not introduce a new algorithm, but systematically investigate the effectiveness of existing unsupervised models on challenging real-world images. We firstly introduce four complexity factors to quantitatively measure the distributions of object- and scene-level biases in appearance and geometry for datasets with human annotations. With the aid of these factors, we empirically find that, not surprisingly, existing unsupervised models catastrophically fail to segment generic objects in real-world images, although they can easily achieve excellent performance on numerous simple synthetic datasets, due to the vast gap in objectness biases between synthetic and real images. By conducting extensive experiments on multiple groups of ablated real-world datasets, we ultimately find that the key factors underlying the colossal failure of existing unsupervised models on real-world images are the challenging distributions of object- and scene-level biases in appearance and geometry. Because of this, the inductive biases introduced in existing unsupervised models can hardly capture the diverse object distributions. Our research results suggest that future work should exploit more explicit objectness biases in the network design.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了单图像的无监督对象分割问题。我们没有引入新的算法，而是系统地研究现有无监督模型在挑战现实世界图像方面的有效性。我们首先引入四个复杂性因素来定量测量具有人工注释的数据集的外观和几何形状中的对象和场景级偏差的分布。借助这些因素，我们凭经验发现，毫不奇怪，现有的无监督模型灾难性地无法分割现实世界图像中的通用对象，尽管它们可以轻松地在许多简单的合成数据集上实现出色的性能，因为合成图像和真实图像之间的对象性偏差存在巨大差距。通过对多组消融的现实世界数据集进行广泛的实验，我们最终发现现有无监督模型在现实世界图像上巨大失败的关键因素是外观和几何中对象和场景级偏差的挑战性分布。因此，现有无监督模型中引入的归纳偏差很难捕获不同的对象分布。我们的研究结果表明，未来的工作应该在网络设计中利用更明确的客观性偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了从真实世界单张图像中进行无监督对象分割的挑战，评估了现有模型在复杂真实场景中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有无监督模型在简单合成数据集上表现优异，但面对真实图像时因对象性和场景偏差分布差异而失效，需系统分析其根本原因。
AI.method: 引入四个复杂度因素量化对象和场景级偏差分布，通过消融实验对比不同真实数据集，分析模型失效的关键因素。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有模型因无法捕捉真实图像中多样的对象分布而大规模失败，主要受制于外观和几何偏差的复杂分布。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应通过网络设计更显式地利用对象性偏差，以提升无监督模型在真实场景中的分割能力。

Unsupervised Object Segmentation from Real-world Single Images 有希望还是难以捉摸？来自现实世界单图像的无监督对象分割 In this paper, we study the problem of unsupervised object segmentation from single images. We do not introduce a new algorithm, but systematically investigate the effectiveness of existing unsupervised models on challenging real-world images. We firstly introduce four complexity factors to quantitatively measure the distributions of object- and scene-level biases in appearance and geometry for datasets with human annotations. With the aid of these factors, we empirically find that, not surprisingly, existing unsupervised models catastrophically fail to segment generic objects in real-world images, although they can easily achieve excellent performance on numerous simple synthetic datasets, due to the vast gap in objectness biases between synthetic and real images. By conducting extensive experiments on multiple groups of ablated real-world datasets, we ultimately find that the key factors underlying the colossal failure of existing unsupervised models on real-world images are the challenging distributions of object- and scene-level biases in appearance and geometry. Because of this, the inductive biases introduced in existing unsupervised models can hardly capture the diverse object distributions. authors_text: Cédric Picron,Punarjay Chakravarty,Tinne Tuytelaars
title: FQDet: Fast-converging Query-based Detector
title_zh: FQDet：快速收敛的基于查询的检测器
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS VTTA workshop 2022
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS VTTA workshop 2022
abstract: Recently, two-stage Deformable DETR introduced the query-based two-stage head, a new type of two-stage head different from the region-based two-stage heads of classical detectors as Faster R-CNN. In query-based two-stage heads, the second stage selects one feature per detection processed by a transformer, called the query, as opposed to pooling a rectangular grid of features processed by CNNs as in region-based detectors. In this work, we improve the query-based head by improving the prior of the cross-attention operation with anchors, significantly speeding up the convergence while increasing its performance. Additionally, we empirically show that by improving the cross-attention prior, auxiliary losses and iterative bounding box mechanisms typically used by DETR-based detectors are no longer needed. By combining the best of both the classical and the DETR-based detectors, our FQDet head peaks at 45.4 AP on the 2017 COCO validation set when using a ResNet-50+TPN backbone, only after training for 12 epochs using the 1x schedule. We outperform other high-performing two-stage heads such as e.g. Cascade R-CNN, while using the same backbone and while being computationally cheaper. Additionally, when using the large ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN backbone and multi-scale testing, our FQDet head achieves 52.9 AP on the 2017 COCO test-dev set after only 12 epochs of training. Code is released at https://github.com/CedricPicron/FQDet .
summary: Recently, two-stage Deformable DETR introduced the query-based two-stage head, a new type of two-stage head different from the region-based two-stage heads of classical detectors as Faster R-CNN. In query-based two-stage heads, the second stage selects one feature per detection processed by a transformer, called the query, as opposed to pooling a rectangular grid of features processed by CNNs as in region-based detectors. In this work, we improve the query-based head by improving the prior of the cross-attention operation with anchors, significantly speeding up the convergence while increasing its performance. Additionally, we empirically show that by improving the cross-attention prior, auxiliary losses and iterative bounding box mechanisms typically used by DETR-based detectors are no longer needed. By combining the best of both the classical and the DETR-based detectors, our FQDet head peaks at 45.4 AP on the 2017 COCO validation set when using a ResNet-50+TPN backbone, only after training for 12 epochs using the 1x schedule. We outperform other high-performing two-stage heads such as e.g. Cascade R-CNN, while using the same backbone and while being computationally cheaper. Additionally, when using the large ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN backbone and multi-scale testing, our FQDet head achieves 52.9 AP on the 2017 COCO test-dev set after only 12 epochs of training. Code is released at https://github.com/CedricPicron/FQDet .
abstract_zh: 最近，两阶段变形DETR引入了基于查询的两阶段头，这是一种不同于Faster R-CNN等经典检测器的基于区域的两阶段头的新型两阶段头。在基于查询的两级头中，第二级为变压器处理的每个检测选择一个特征，称为查询，而不是像基于区域的检测器那样汇集由 CNN 处理的矩形特征网格。在这项工作中，我们通过改进锚点交叉注意操作的先验来改进基于查询的头，显着加快收敛速度​​，同时提高其性能。此外，我们凭经验表明，通过改进交叉注意先验，不再需要基于 DETR 的检测器通常使用的辅助损失和迭代边界框机制。通过结合经典检测器和基于 DETR 的检测器的优点，我们的 FQDet 头在使用 ResNet-50+TPN 主干网时在 2017 年 COCO 验证集上达到 45.4 AP 峰值，仅在使用 1x 计划训练 12 个 epoch 后。我们的性能优于其他高性能两级头，例如Cascade R-CNN，同时使用相同的主干网络并且计算成本更低。此外，当使用大型 ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN 主干和多尺度测试时，我们的 FQDet 头仅经过 12 个 epoch 的训练，就在 2017 年 COCO 测试开发集上达到了 52.9 AP。代码发布于 https://github.com/CedricPicron/FQDet 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FQDet，一种基于查询的快速收敛检测器，通过改进交叉注意力机制提升性能并加速收敛。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段检测器（如Faster R-CNN）依赖区域特征池化，而基于查询的两阶段头（如Deformable DETR）存在收敛速度慢、需复杂辅助机制的问题。
AI.method: 通过引入锚点改进交叉注意力先验，去除DETR类检测器的辅助损失和迭代框机制，结合经典检测器与DETR的优势设计FQDet头。
AI.result: 在COCO2017验证集上，使用ResNet-50+TPN主干12轮训练达45.4 AP；使用ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN多尺度测试达52.9 AP，计算成本低于同类方法。
AI.conclusion: FQDet通过优化查询机制实现高效收敛，以更少训练轮次和计算资源超越现有两阶段检测器，为检测任务提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FQDet，一种基于查询的快速收敛检测器，通过改进交叉注意力机制提升性能并加速收敛。
ai_content.motivation: 传统两阶段检测器（如Faster R-CNN）依赖区域特征池化，而基于查询的两阶段头（如Deformable DETR）存在收敛速度慢、需复杂辅助机制的问题。
ai_content.method: 通过引入锚点改进交叉注意力先验，去除DETR类检测器的辅助损失和迭代框机制，结合经典检测器与DETR的优势设计FQDet头。
ai_content.result: 在COCO2017验证集上，使用ResNet-50+TPN主干12轮训练达45.4 AP；使用ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN多尺度测试达52.9 AP，计算成本低于同类方法。
ai_content.conclusion: FQDet通过优化查询机制实现高效收敛，以更少训练轮次和计算资源超越现有两阶段检测器，为检测任务提供新思路。

search_text: FQDet: Fast-converging Query-based Detector FQDet：快速收敛的基于查询的检测器 Recently, two-stage Deformable DETR introduced the query-based two-stage head, a new type of two-stage head different from the region-based two-stage heads of classical detectors as Faster R-CNN. In query-based two-stage heads, the second stage selects one feature per detection processed by a transformer, called the query, as opposed to pooling a rectangular grid of features processed by CNNs as in region-based detectors. In this work, we improve the query-based head by improving the prior of the cross-attention operation with anchors, significantly speeding up the convergence while increasing its performance. Additionally, we empirically show that by improving the cross-attention prior, auxiliary losses and iterative bounding box mechanisms typically used by DETR-based detectors are no longer needed. By combining the best of both the classical and the DETR-based detectors, our FQDet head peaks at 45.4 AP on the 2017 COCO validation set when using a ResNet-50+TPN backbone, only after training for 12 epochs using the 1x schedule. We outperform other high-performing two-stage heads such as e.g. Cascade R-CNN, while using the same backbone and while being computationally cheaper. Additionally, when using the large ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN backbone and multi-scale testing, our FQDet head achieves 52.9 AP on the 2017 COCO test-dev set after only 12 epochs of training. Code is released at https://github.com/CedricPicron/FQDet . 最近，两阶段变形DETR引入了基于查询的两阶段头，这是一种不同于Faster R-CNN等经典检测器的基于区域的两阶段头的新型两阶段头。在基于查询的两级头中，第二级为变压器处理的每个检测选择一个特征，称为查询，而不是像基于区域的检测器那样汇集由 CNN 处理的矩形特征网格。在这项工作中，我们通过改进锚点交叉注意操作的先验来改进基于查询的头，显着加快收敛速度​​，同时提高其性能。此外，我们凭经验表明，通过改进交叉注意先验，不再需要基于 DETR 的检测器通常使用的辅助损失和迭代边界框机制。通过结合经典检测器和基于 DETR 的检测器的优点，我们的 FQDet 头在使用 ResNet-50+TPN 主干网时在 2017 年 COCO 验证集上达到 45.4 AP 峰值，仅在使用 1x 计划训练 12 个 epoch 后。我们的性能优于其他高性能两级头，例如Cascade R-CNN，同时使用相同的主干网络并且计算成本更低。此外，当使用大型 ResNeXt-101-DCN+TPN 主干和多尺度测试时，我们的 FQDet 头仅经过 12 个 epoch 的训练，就在 2017 年 COCO 测试开发集上达到了 52.9 AP。代码发布于 https://github.com/CedricPicron/FQDet 。 本文提出FQDet，一种基于查询的快速收敛检测器，通过改进交叉注意力机制提升性能并加速收敛。 Cédric Picron,Punarjay Chakravarty,Tinne Tuytelaars cs.CV

authors_text: Yan Wang,Gautham Vasan,A. Rupam Mahmood
title: Real-Time Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Based Robotics Utilizing Local and Remote Computers
title_zh: 利用本地和远程计算机的基于视觉的机器人的实时强化学习
comment: Appears in Proceedings of the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Source code at https://github.com/rlai-lab/relod and companion video at https://youtu.be/7iZKryi1xSY
comments: Appears in Proceedings of the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Source code at https://github.com/rlai-lab/relod and companion video at https://youtu.be/7iZKryi1xSY
abstract: Real-time learning is crucial for robotic agents adapting to ever-changing, non-stationary environments. A common setup for a robotic agent is to have two different computers simultaneously: a resource-limited local computer tethered to the robot and a powerful remote computer connected wirelessly. Given such a setup, it is unclear to what extent the performance of a learning system can be affected by resource limitations and how to efficiently use the wirelessly connected powerful computer to compensate for any performance loss. In this paper, we implement a real-time learning system called the Remote-Local Distributed (ReLoD) system to distribute computations of two deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms, Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), between a local and a remote computer. The performance of the system is evaluated on two vision-based control tasks developed using a robotic arm and a mobile robot. Our results show that SAC's performance degrades heavily on a resource-limited local computer. Strikingly, when all computations of the learning system are deployed on a remote workstation, SAC fails to compensate for the performance loss, indicating that, without careful consideration, using a powerful remote computer may not result in performance improvement. However, a carefully chosen distribution of computations of SAC consistently and substantially improves its performance on both tasks. On the other hand, the performance of PPO remains largely unaffected by the distribution of computations. In addition, when all computations happen solely on a powerful tethered computer, the performance of our system remains on par with an existing system that is well-tuned for using a single machine. ReLoD is the only publicly available system for real-time RL that applies to multiple robots for vision-based tasks.

A common setup for a robotic agent is to have two different computers simultaneously: a resource-limited local computer tethered to the robot and a powerful remote computer connected wirelessly. Given such a setup, it is unclear to what extent the performance of a learning system can be affected by resource limitations and how to efficiently use the wirelessly connected powerful computer to compensate for any performance loss. In this paper, we implement a real-time learning system called the Remote-Local Distributed (ReLoD) system to distribute computations of two deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms, Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), between a local and a remote computer. The performance of the system is evaluated on two vision-based control tasks developed using a robotic arm and a mobile robot. Our results show that SAC's performance degrades heavily on a resource-limited local computer. Strikingly, when all computations of the learning system are deployed on a remote workstation, SAC fails to compensate for the performance loss, indicating that, without careful consideration, using a powerful remote computer may not result in performance improvement. However, a carefully chosen distribution of computations of SAC consistently and substantially improves its performance on both tasks. On the other hand, the performance of PPO remains largely unaffected by the distribution of computations. In addition, when all computations happen solely on a powerful tethered computer, the performance of our system remains on par with an existing system that is well-tuned for using a single machine. ReLoD is the only publicly available system for real-time RL that applies to multiple robots for vision-based tasks.
abstract_zh: 实时学习对于机器人代理适应不断变化的非静态环境至关重要。机器人代理的常见设置是同时拥有两台不同的计算机：一台与机器人连接的资源有限的本地计算机和一台无线连接的强大远程计算机。鉴于这样的设置，目前尚不清楚学习系统的性能会在多大程度上受到资源限制的影响，以及如何有效地使用无线连接的强大计算机来补偿任何性能损失。在本文中，我们实现了一个称为远程本地分布式（ReLoD）系统的实时学习系统，以在本地和远程计算机之间分配两种深度强化学习（RL）算法（Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）和近端策略优化（PPO））的计算。该系统的性能通过使用机械臂和移动机器人开发的两个基于视觉的控制任务进行评估。我们的结果表明，SAC 的性能在资源有限的本地计算机上严重下降。引人注目的是，当学习系统的所有计算都部署在远程工作站上时，SAC 无法补偿性能损失，这表明，如果不仔细考虑，使用功能强大的远程计算机可能不会带来性能提升。然而，精心选择的 SAC 计算分布能够一致且显着地提高其在这两项任务上的性能。另一方面，PPO 的性能在很大程度上不受计算分布的影响。此外，当所有计算仅发生在功能强大的系留计算机上时，我们系统的性能仍与针对使用单台机器进行了良好调整的现有系统相当。 ReLoD 是唯一公开的实时强化学习系统，适用于多个机器人执行基于视觉的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ReLoD的实时强化学习系统，通过在本地和远程计算机之间分配计算资源，优化视觉机器人任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在动态环境中实时学习，但受限于本地计算资源，如何有效利用远程计算能力以补偿性能损失尚不明确。
AI.method: 实现ReLoD系统，将Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）和Proximal Policy Optimization（PPO）算法的计算分布在本地和远程计算机上，并在机械臂和移动机器人任务中评估性能。
AI.result: SAC在本地计算时性能显著下降，但合理分配计算可改善；PPO性能不受影响。所有计算集中在远程时SAC未改善，但单机高性能计算时表现与现有系统相当。
AI.conclusion: 合理分配计算资源可提升SAC性能，但需避免过度依赖远程计算；PPO更适合分布式环境，ReLoD是首个支持多视觉机器人任务的实时RL系统。

search_text: Real-Time Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Based Robotics Utilizing Local and Remote Computers 利用本地和远程计算机的基于视觉的机器人的实时强化学习 Real-time learning is crucial for robotic agents adapting to ever-changing, non-stationary environments. In this paper, we implement a real-time learning system called the Remote-Local Distributed (ReLoD) system to distribute computations of two deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms, Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), between a local and a remote computer. The performance of the system is evaluated on two vision-based control tasks developed using a robotic arm and a mobile robot. Our results show that SAC's performance degrades heavily on a resource-limited local computer. Strikingly, when all computations of the learning system are deployed on a remote workstation, SAC fails to compensate for the performance loss, indicating that, without careful consideration, using a powerful remote computer may not result in performance improvement. However, a carefully chosen distribution of computations of SAC consistently and substantially improves its performance on both tasks. On the other hand, the performance of PPO remains largely unaffected by the distribution of computations. In addition, when all computations happen solely on a powerful tethered computer, the performance of our system remains on par with an existing system that is well-tuned for using a single machine. ReLoD is the only publicly available system for real-time RL that applies to multiple robots for vision-based tasks. 实时学习对于机器人代理适应不断变化的非静态环境至关重要。机器人代理的常见设置是同时拥有两台不同的计算机：一台与机器人连接的资源有限的本地计算机和一台无线连接的强大远程计算机。鉴于这样的设置，目前尚不清楚学习系统的性能会在多大程度上受到资源限制的影响，以及如何有效地使用无线连接的强大计算机来补偿任何性能损失。在本文中，我们实现了一个称为远程本地分布式（ReLoD）系统的实时学习系统，以在本地和远程计算机之间分配两种深度强化学习（RL）算法（Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）和近端策略优化（PPO））的计算。该系统的性能通过使用机械臂和移动机器人开发的两个基于视觉的控制任务进行评估。我们的结果表明，SAC 的性能在资源有限的本地计算机上严重下降。引人注目的是，当学习系统的所有计算都部署在远程工作站上时，SAC 无法补偿性能损失，这表明，如果不仔细考虑，使用功能强大的远程计算机可能不会带来性能提升。然而，精心选择的 SAC 计算分布能够一致且显着地提高其在这两项任务上的性能。另一方面，PPO 的性能在很大程度上不受计算分布的影响。此外，当所有计算仅发生在功能强大的系留计算机上时，我们系统的性能仍与针对使用单台机器进行了良好调整的现有系统相当。 ReLoD 是唯一公开的实时强化学习系统，适用于多个机器人执行基于视觉的任务。 本文提出了一种名为ReLoD的实时强化学习系统，通过在本地和远程计算机之间分配计算资源，优化视觉机器人任务的性能。 Yan Wang,Gautham Vasan,A. authors_text: Trong-Tung Nguyen,Hieu H. Pham,Phi Le Nguyen,Thanh Hung Nguyen,Minh Do
title: Multi-stream Fusion for Class Incremental Learning in Pill Image Classification
title_zh: 药丸图像分类中类增量学习的多流融合
comment: Accepted for publication in the Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication in the Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV 2022)
abstract: Classifying pill categories from real-world images is crucial for various smart healthcare applications. Although existing approaches in image classification might achieve a good performance on fixed pill categories, they fail to handle novel instances of pill categories that are frequently presented to the learning algorithm. To this end, a trivial solution is to train the model with novel classes. However, this may result in a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting, in which the system forgets what it learned in previous classes. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing the class incremental learning (CIL) ability to traditional pill image classification systems. Specifically, we propose a novel incremental multi-stream intermediate fusion framework enabling incorporation of an additional guidance information stream that best matches the domain of the problem into various state-of-the-art CIL methods. From this framework, we consider color-specific information of pill images as a guidance stream and devise an approach, namely "Color Guidance with Multi-stream intermediate fusion"(CG-IMIF) for solving CIL pill image classification task. We conduct comprehensive experiments on real-world incremental pill image classification dataset, namely VAIPE-PCIL, and find that the CG-IMIF consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art methods by a large margin in different task settings. Our code, data, and trained model are available at https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/CG-IMIF.
summary: Classifying pill categories from real-world images is crucial for various smart healthcare applications. Although existing approaches in image classification might achieve a good performance on fixed pill categories, they fail to handle novel instances of pill categories that are frequently presented to the learning algorithm. To this end, a trivial solution is to train the model with novel classes. However, this may result in a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting, in which the system forgets what it learned in previous classes. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing the class incremental learning (CIL) ability to traditional pill image classification systems. Specifically, we propose a novel incremental multi-stream intermediate fusion framework enabling incorporation of an additional guidance information stream that best matches the domain of the problem into various state-of-the-art CIL methods. From this framework, we consider color-specific information of pill images as a guidance stream and devise an approach, namely "Color Guidance with Multi-stream intermediate fusion"(CG-IMIF) for solving CIL pill image classification task. We conduct comprehensive experiments on real-world incremental pill image classification dataset, namely VAIPE-PCIL, and find that the CG-IMIF consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art methods by a large margin in different task settings. Our code, data, and trained model are available at https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/CG-IMIF.
abstract_zh: 从现实世界的图像中对药丸类别进行分类对于各种智能医疗应用至关重要。尽管图像分类中的现有方法可能在固定药丸类别上取得良好的性能，但它们无法处理经常呈现给学习算法的药丸类别的新实例。为此，一个简单的解决方案是使用新颖的类来训练模型。然而，这可能会导致一种称为灾难性遗忘的现象，即系统忘记了在之前课程中学到的内容。在本文中，我们通过将类增量学习（CIL）能力引入传统药丸图像分类系统来应对这一挑战。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的增量多流中间融合框架，能够将与问题领域最匹配的附加指导信息流合并到各种最先进的 CIL 方法中。在此框架中，我们将药丸图像的颜色特定信息视为指导流，并设计了一种方法，即“多流中间融合的颜色指导”（CG-IMIF）来解决 CIL 药丸图像分类任务。我们对现实世界的增量药丸图像分类数据集 VAIPE-PCIL 进行了全面的实验，发现 CG-IMIF 在不同的任务设置中始终大幅优于几种最先进的方法。我们的代码、数据和训练模型可在 https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/CG-IMIF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多流融合框架CG-IMIF，用于解决药品图像分类中的类增量学习问题，通过引入颜色指导信息流提升模型对新类别学习时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分类方法在处理药品图像时无法有效应对新增类别，导致灾难性遗忘问题，需设计增量学习框架以兼顾新旧类别识别。
AI.method: 构建包含颜色特征指导流的多流中间融合框架CG-IMIF，将颜色信息作为辅助流与主任务流融合，增强模型对药品图像类别增量学习的适应能力。
AI.result: 在VAIPE-PCIL数据集上，CG-IMIF方法在不同任务设置下均显著优于现有先进算法，验证了颜色指导多流融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入领域相关的颜色指导流，多流融合框架有效缓解了类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，为药品图像分类提供了新思路。

search_text: Multi-stream Fusion for Class Incremental Learning in Pill Image Classification 药丸图像分类中类增量学习的多流融合 Classifying pill categories from real-world images is crucial for various smart healthcare applications. Although existing approaches in image classification might achieve a good performance on fixed pill categories, they fail to handle novel instances of pill categories that are frequently presented to the learning algorithm. To this end, a trivial solution is to train the model with novel classes. However, this may result in a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting, in which the system forgets what it learned in previous classes. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing the class incremental learning (CIL) ability to traditional pill image classification systems. Specifically, we propose a novel incremental multi-stream intermediate fusion framework enabling incorporation of an additional guidance information stream that best matches the domain of the problem into various state-of-the-art CIL methods. From this framework, we consider color-specific information of pill images as a guidance stream and devise an approach, namely "Color Guidance with Multi-stream intermediate fusion"(CG-IMIF) for solving CIL pill image classification task. We conduct comprehensive experiments on real-world incremental pill image classification dataset, namely VAIPE-PCIL, and find that the CG-IMIF consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art methods by a large margin in different task settings. Our code, data, and trained model are available at https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/CG-IMIF. 从现实世界的图像中对药丸类别进行分类对于各种智能医疗应用至关重要。尽管图像分类中的现有方法可能在固定药丸类别上取得良好的性能，但它们无法处理经常呈现给学习算法的药丸类别的新实例。为此，一个简单的解决方案是使用新颖的类来训练模型。然而，这可能会导致一种称为灾难性遗忘的现象，即系统忘记了在之前课程中学到的内容。在本文中，我们通过将类增量学习（CIL）能力引入传统药丸图像分类系统来应对这一挑战。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的增量多流中间融合框架，能够将与问题领域最匹配的附加指导信息流合并到各种最先进的 CIL 方法中。在此框架中，我们将药丸图像的颜色特定信息视为指导流，并设计了一种方法，即“多流中间融合的颜色指导”（CG-IMIF）来解决 CIL 药丸图像分类任务。我们对现实世界的增量药丸图像分类数据集 VAIPE-PCIL 进行了全面的实验，发现 CG-IMIF 在不同的任务设置中始终大幅优于几种最先进的方法。我们的代码、数据和训练模型可在 https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/CG-IMIF 获取。 本文提出一种多流融合框架CG-IMIF，用于解决药品图像分类中的类增量学习问题，通过引入颜色指导信息流提升模型对新类别学习时的鲁棒性。 Trong-Tung Nguyen,Hieu H. authors_text: Junjie Jiang,Delei Kong,Kuanxv Hou,Xinjie Huang,Hao Zhuang,Fang Zheng
title: Neuro-Planner: A 3D Visual Navigation Method for MAV with Depth Camera based on Neuromorphic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Neuro-Planner：一种基于神经形态强化学习的深度相机 MAV 3D 视觉导航方法
abstract: Traditional visual navigation methods of micro aerial vehicle (MAV) usually calculate a passable path that satisfies the constraints depending on a prior map. However, these methods have issues such as high demand for computing resources and poor robustness in face of unfamiliar environments. Aiming to solve the above problems, we propose a neuromorphic reinforcement learning method (Neuro-Planner) that combines spiking neural network (SNN) and deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to realize MAV 3D visual navigation with depth camera. Specifically, we design spiking actor network based on two-state LIF (TS-LIF) neurons and its encoding-decoding schemes for efficient inference. Then our improved hybrid deep deterministic policy gradient (HDDPG) and TS-LIF-based spatio-temporal back propagation (STBP) algorithms are used as the training framework for actor-critic network architecture. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed Neuro-Planner, we carry out detailed comparison experiments with various SNN training algorithm (STBP, BPTT and SLAYER) in the software-in-the-loop (SITL) simulation framework. The navigation success rate of our HDDPG-STBP is 4.3\% and 5.3\% higher than that of the original DDPG in the two evaluation environments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work combining neuromorphic computing and deep reinforcement learning for MAV 3D visual navigation task.
summary: Traditional visual navigation methods of micro aerial vehicle (MAV) usually calculate a passable path that satisfies the constraints depending on a prior map. However, these methods have issues such as high demand for computing resources and poor robustness in face of unfamiliar environments. Aiming to solve the above problems, we propose a neuromorphic reinforcement learning method (Neuro-Planner) that combines spiking neural network (SNN) and deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to realize MAV 3D visual navigation with depth camera. Specifically, we design spiking actor network based on two-state LIF (TS-LIF) neurons and its encoding-decoding schemes for efficient inference. Then our improved hybrid deep deterministic policy gradient (HDDPG) and TS-LIF-based spatio-temporal back propagation (STBP) algorithms are used as the training framework for actor-critic network architecture. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed Neuro-Planner, we carry out detailed comparison experiments with various SNN training algorithm (STBP, BPTT and SLAYER) in the software-in-the-loop (SITL) simulation framework. The navigation success rate of our HDDPG-STBP is 4.3\% and 5.3\% higher than that of the original DDPG in the two evaluation environments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work combining neuromorphic computing and deep reinforcement learning for MAV 3D visual navigation task.
abstract_zh: 传统的微型飞行器（MAV）视觉导航方法通常根据先验地图计算出满足约束条件的可通行路径。但这些方法存在对计算资源要求高、面对陌生环境鲁棒性差等问题。针对上述问题，我们提出了一种神经形态强化学习方法（Neuro-Planner），结合尖峰神经网络（SNN）和深度强化学习（DRL）来实现带有深度相机的MAV 3D视觉导航。具体来说，我们设计了基于二态 LIF (TS-LIF) 神经元的尖峰 Actor 网络及其编码-解码方案，以实现高效推理。然后，我们改进的混合深度确定性策略梯度（HDDPG）和基于 TS-LIF 的时空反向传播（STBP）算法被用作行动者批评家网络架构的训练框架。为了验证所提出的 Neuro-Planner 的有效性，我们在软件在环（SITL）仿真框架中与各种 SNN 训练算法（STBP、BPTT 和 SLAYER）进行了详细的比较实验。我们的HDDPG-STBP在两个评估环境中的导航成功率比原始DDPG提高了4.3%和5.3%。据我们所知，这是第一个将神经拟态计算和深度强化学习相结合的 MAV 3D 视觉导航任务的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脉冲神经网络和深度强化学习的三维视觉导航方法Neuro-Planner，用于配备深度相机的微型飞行器（MAV）导航。
AI.motivation: 传统MAV视觉导航方法依赖先验地图，存在计算资源需求高、面对陌生环境鲁棒性差的问题，需开发更高效且适应性强的导航方案。
AI.method: 设计基于双状态LIF神经元的脉冲执行器网络及编解码方案，结合改进的混合深度确定性策略梯度（HDDPG）算法与时空反向传播（STBP）算法，构建演员-评论家网络训练框架。
AI.result: 在软件在环仿真中，HDDPG-STBP方法的导航成功率较原始DDPG分别提升4.3%和5.3%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次将类脑计算与深度强化学习结合用于MAV三维视觉导航任务，为高效鲁棒的自主导航提供了新思路。

However, these methods have issues such as high demand for computing resources and poor robustness in face of unfamiliar environments. authors_text: Jonathan Ho,William Chan,Chitwan Saharia,Jay Whang,Ruiqi Gao,Alexey Gritsenko,Diederik P. Kingma,Ben Poole,Mohammad Norouzi,David J. Fleet,Tim Salimans
title: Imagen Video: High Definition Video Generation with Diffusion Models
title_zh: Imagen Video：使用扩散模型生成高清视频
comment: See accompanying website: https://imagen.research.google/video/
comments: See accompanying website: https://imagen.research.google/video/
abstract: We present Imagen Video, a text-conditional video generation system based on a cascade of video diffusion models. Given a text prompt, Imagen Video generates high definition videos using a base video generation model and a sequence of interleaved spatial and temporal video super-resolution models. We describe how we scale up the system as a high definition text-to-video model including design decisions such as the choice of fully-convolutional temporal and spatial super-resolution models at certain resolutions, and the choice of the v-parameterization of diffusion models. In addition, we confirm and transfer findings from previous work on diffusion-based image generation to the video generation setting. Finally, we apply progressive distillation to our video models with classifier-free guidance for fast, high quality sampling. We find Imagen Video not only capable of generating videos of high fidelity, but also having a high degree of controllability and world knowledge, including the ability to generate diverse videos and text animations in various artistic styles and with 3D object understanding. See https://imagen.research.google/video/ for samples.
summary: We present Imagen Video, a text-conditional video generation system based on a cascade of video diffusion models. Given a text prompt, Imagen Video generates high definition videos using a base video generation model and a sequence of interleaved spatial and temporal video super-resolution models. We describe how we scale up the system as a high definition text-to-video model including design decisions such as the choice of fully-convolutional temporal and spatial super-resolution models at certain resolutions, and the choice of the v-parameterization of diffusion models. In addition, we confirm and transfer findings from previous work on diffusion-based image generation to the video generation setting. Finally, we apply progressive distillation to our video models with classifier-free guidance for fast, high quality sampling. We find Imagen Video not only capable of generating videos of high fidelity, but also having a high degree of controllability and world knowledge, including the ability to generate diverse videos and text animations in various artistic styles and with 3D object understanding. See https://imagen.research.google/video/ for samples.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Imagen Video，这是一种基于级联视频扩散模型的文本条件视频生成系统。给定文本提示，Imagen Video 使用基本视频生成模型和一系列交错的空间和时间视频超分辨率模型生成高清视频。我们描述了如何将系统扩展为高清文本到视频模型，包括设计决策，例如在某些分辨率下选择全卷积时间和空间超分辨率模型，以及选择扩散模型的 v 参数化。此外，我们确认并将之前基于扩散的图像生成工作的发现转移到视频生成设置中。最后，我们将渐进式蒸馏应用于我们的视频模型，并使用无分类器的指导来实现快速、高质量的采样。我们发现Imagen Video不仅能够生成高保真视频，而且还具有高度的可控性和世界知识，包括能够生成各种艺术风格和3D对象理解的多样化视频和文本动画。有关示例，请参阅 https://imagen.research.google/video/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Imagen Video，一种基于扩散模型的文本条件高清视频生成系统，通过级联视频扩散模型和超分辨率技术实现高质量视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在分辨率、可控性和多样性方面存在不足，需探索更高效的扩散模型架构和训练策略以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 采用级联扩散模型架构，结合全卷积空间/时间超分辨率模型，使用v参数化扩散模型，并迁移图像生成领域的渐进蒸馏与无分类器指导技术。
AI.result: 生成视频在保真度、艺术风格多样性及3D物体理解方面表现优异，支持复杂文本提示的可控生成，采样效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Imagen Video验证了扩散模型在视频生成中的有效性，为高保真文本到视频生成提供了新范式和关键技术方案。

search_text: Imagen Video: High Definition Video Generation with Diffusion Models Imagen Video：使用扩散模型生成高清视频 We present Imagen Video, a text-conditional video generation system based on a cascade of video diffusion models. Given a text prompt, Imagen Video generates high definition videos using a base video generation model and a sequence of interleaved spatial and temporal video super-resolution models. We describe how we scale up the system as a high definition text-to-video model including design decisions such as the choice of fully-convolutional temporal and spatial super-resolution models at certain resolutions, and the choice of the v-parameterization of diffusion models. In addition, we confirm and transfer findings from previous work on diffusion-based image generation to the video generation setting. Finally, we apply progressive distillation to our video models with classifier-free guidance for fast, high quality sampling. We find Imagen Video not only capable of generating videos of high fidelity, but also having a high degree of controllability and world knowledge, including the ability to generate diverse videos and text animations in various artistic styles and with 3D object understanding. See https://imagen.research.google/video/ for samples. 我们提出了 Imagen Video，这是一种基于级联视频扩散模型的文本条件视频生成系统。给定文本提示，Imagen Video 使用基本视频生成模型和一系列交错的空间和时间视频超分辨率模型生成高清视频。我们描述了如何将系统扩展为高清文本到视频模型，包括设计决策，例如在某些分辨率下选择全卷积时间和空间超分辨率模型，以及选择扩散模型的 v 参数化。此外，我们确认并将之前基于扩散的图像生成工作的发现转移到视频生成设置中。最后，我们将渐进式蒸馏应用于我们的视频模型，并使用无分类器的指导来实现快速、高质量的采样。我们发现Imagen Video不仅能够生成高保真视频，而且还具有高度的可控性和世界知识，包括能够生成各种艺术风格和3D对象理解的多样化视频和文本动画。有关示例，请参阅 https://imagen.research.google/video/。 本文提出Imagen Video，一种基于扩散模型的文本条件高清视频生成系统，通过级联视频扩散模型和超分辨率技术实现高质量视频生成。 Jonathan Ho,William Chan,Chitwan Saharia,Jay Whang,Ruiqi Gao,Alexey Gritsenko,Diederik P. Kingma,Ben Poole,Mohammad Norouzi,David J. Fleet,Tim Salimans cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yan Ding,Cheng Cui,Xiaohan Zhang,Shiqi Zhang
title: GLAD: Grounded Layered Autonomous Driving for Complex Service Tasks
title_zh: GLAD：用于复杂服务任务的接地分层自动驾驶
abstract: Given the current point-to-point navigation capabilities of autonomous vehicles, researchers are looking into complex service requests that require the vehicles to visit multiple points of interest. In this paper, we develop a layered planning framework, called GLAD, for complex service requests in autonomous urban driving. There are three layers for service-level, behavior-level, and motion-level planning. The layered framework is unique in its tight coupling, where the different layers communicate user preferences, safety estimates, and motion costs for system optimization. GLAD is visually grounded by perceptual learning from a dataset of 13.8k instances collected from driving behaviors. GLAD enables autonomous vehicles to efficiently and safely fulfill complex service requests. Experimental results from abstract and full simulation show that our system outperforms a few competitive baselines from the literature.
summary: Given the current point-to-point navigation capabilities of autonomous vehicles, researchers are looking into complex service requests that require the vehicles to visit multiple points of interest. In this paper, we develop a layered planning framework, called GLAD, for complex service requests in autonomous urban driving. There are three layers for service-level, behavior-level, and motion-level planning. The layered framework is unique in its tight coupling, where the different layers communicate user preferences, safety estimates, and motion costs for system optimization. GLAD is visually grounded by perceptual learning from a dataset of 13.8k instances collected from driving behaviors. GLAD enables autonomous vehicles to efficiently and safely fulfill complex service requests. Experimental results from abstract and full simulation show that our system outperforms a few competitive baselines from the literature.
abstract_zh: 鉴于自动驾驶汽车目前的点对点导航能力，研究人员正在研究需要车辆访问多个兴趣点的复杂服务请求。在本文中，我们开发了一个名为 GLAD 的分层规划框架，用于解决城市自动驾驶中的复杂服务请求。服务级、行为级和运动级规划分为三个层次。分层框架的独特之处在于其紧密耦合，其中不同层传达用户偏好、安全估计和系统优化的运动成本。 GLAD 通过从驾驶行为中收集的 13,800 个实例数据集中进行感知学习来实现视觉基础。 GLAD 使自动驾驶车辆能够高效、安全地满足复杂的服务请求。抽象和完整模拟的实验结果表明，我们的系统优于文献中的一些竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLAD分层规划框架，用于解决自动驾驶车辆处理复杂多点服务任务的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统仅能完成点对点导航，难以应对需要访问多个兴趣点的复杂服务需求。
AI.method: 构建包含服务级、行为级和运动级规划的三层框架，通过感知学习13.8k驾驶数据实现视觉 grounding，并在各层间共享用户偏好、安全估计和运动成本信息。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明GLAD在复杂服务任务中优于现有基线方法，展现出更高的效率和安全性。
AI.conclusion: GLAD框架通过紧密耦合的分层规划和视觉感知学习，有效解决了复杂城市驾驶场景下的多任务服务需求。

authors_text: Zhili Zhang,Songyang Han,Jiangwei Wang,Fei Miao
title: Spatial-Temporal-Aware Safe Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning of Connected Autonomous Vehicles in Challenging Scenarios
title_zh: 具有挑战性的场景中联网自动驾驶车辆的时空感知安全多智能体强化学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023). 6 pages, 5 figures
comments: This paper has been accepted by the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023). 6 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Communication technologies enable coordination among connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs). However, it remains unclear how to utilize shared information to improve the safety and efficiency of the CAV system in dynamic and complicated driving scenarios. In this work, we propose a framework of constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with a parallel Safety Shield for CAVs in challenging driving scenarios that includes unconnected hazard vehicles. The coordination mechanisms of the proposed MARL include information sharing and cooperative policy learning, with Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-Transformer as a spatial-temporal encoder that enhances the agent's environment awareness. The Safety Shield module with Control Barrier Functions (CBF)-based safety checking protects the agents from taking unsafe actions. We design a constrained multi-agent advantage actor-critic (CMAA2C) algorithm to train safe and cooperative policies for CAVs. With the experiment deployed in the CARLA simulator, we verify the performance of the safety checking, spatial-temporal encoder, and coordination mechanisms designed in our method by comparative experiments in several challenging scenarios with unconnected hazard vehicles. Results show that our proposed methodology significantly increases system safety and efficiency in challenging scenarios.
summary: Communication technologies enable coordination among connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs). However, it remains unclear how to utilize shared information to improve the safety and efficiency of the CAV system in dynamic and complicated driving scenarios. In this work, we propose a framework of constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with a parallel Safety Shield for CAVs in challenging driving scenarios that includes unconnected hazard vehicles. The coordination mechanisms of the proposed MARL include information sharing and cooperative policy learning, with Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-Transformer as a spatial-temporal encoder that enhances the agent's environment awareness. The Safety Shield module with Control Barrier Functions (CBF)-based safety checking protects the agents from taking unsafe actions. We design a constrained multi-agent advantage actor-critic (CMAA2C) algorithm to train safe and cooperative policies for CAVs. With the experiment deployed in the CARLA simulator, we verify the performance of the safety checking, spatial-temporal encoder, and coordination mechanisms designed in our method by comparative experiments in several challenging scenarios with unconnected hazard vehicles. Results show that our proposed methodology significantly increases system safety and efficiency in challenging scenarios.
abstract_zh: 通信技术可实现互联自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 之间的协调。然而，如何利用共享信息来提高CAV系统在动态和复杂驾驶场景中的安全性和效率仍不清楚。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个约束多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 框架，该框架具有 CAV 的并行安全防护罩，可用于具有挑战性的驾驶场景（包括未连接的危险车辆）。所提出的 MARL 的协调机制包括信息共享和合作策略学习，并以图卷积网络（GCN）-Transformer 作为时空编码器，增强智能体的环境感知能力。安全盾模块具有基于控制屏障功能 (CBF) 的安全检查，可保护代理免于采取不安全的操作。我们设计了一种约束多智能体优势行动者批评家 (CMAA2C​​) 算法来训练 CAV 的安全和合作策略。通过在 CARLA 模拟器中部署的实验，我们通过在几个具有未连接危险车辆的挑战性场景中进行比较实验，验证了我们方法中设计的安全检查、时空编码器和协调机制的性能。结果表明，我们提出的方法在具有挑战性的场景中显着提高了系统的安全性和效率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时空感知的约束多智能体强化学习框架，提升车联网在复杂场景中的安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效利用共享信息来提升车联网在动态复杂场景中的安全性和效率，尤其是在存在未连接危险车辆的情况下。
AI.method: 提出结合GCN-Transformer时空编码器与控制屏障函数安全模块的约束多智能体强化学习框架，设计CMAA2C算法实现安全协作策略。
AI.result: 实验验证了安全检查、时空编码器和协作机制的有效性，显著提升复杂场景下的系统安全性和效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升车联网在挑战性场景中的安全与效率，为未来智能交通系统研究提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于时空感知的约束多智能体强化学习框架，提升车联网在复杂场景中的安全性和效率。

search_text: Spatial-Temporal-Aware Safe Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning of Connected Autonomous Vehicles in Challenging Scenarios 具有挑战性的场景中联网自动驾驶车辆的时空感知安全多智能体强化学习 Communication technologies enable coordination among connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs). However, it remains unclear how to utilize shared information to improve the safety and efficiency of the CAV system in dynamic and complicated driving scenarios. In this work, we propose a framework of constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with a parallel Safety Shield for CAVs in challenging driving scenarios that includes unconnected hazard vehicles. The coordination mechanisms of the proposed MARL include information sharing and cooperative policy learning, with Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-Transformer as a spatial-temporal encoder that enhances the agent's environment awareness. The Safety Shield module with Control Barrier Functions (CBF)-based safety checking protects the agents from taking unsafe actions. We design a constrained multi-agent advantage actor-critic (CMAA2C) algorithm to train safe and cooperative policies for CAVs. With the experiment deployed in the CARLA simulator, we verify the performance of the safety checking, spatial-temporal encoder, and coordination mechanisms designed in our method by comparative experiments in several challenging scenarios with unconnected hazard vehicles. Results show that our proposed methodology significantly increases system safety and efficiency in challenging scenarios. 通信技术可实现互联自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 之间的协调。然而，如何利用共享信息来提高CAV系统在动态和复杂驾驶场景中的安全性和效率仍不清楚。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个约束多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 框架，该框架具有 CAV 的并行安全防护罩，可用于具有挑战性的驾驶场景（包括未连接的危险车辆）。所提出的 MARL 的协调机制包括信息共享和合作策略学习，并以图卷积网络（GCN）-Transformer 作为时空编码器，增强智能体的环境感知能力。安全盾模块具有基于控制屏障功能 (CBF) 的安全检查，可保护代理免于采取不安全的操作。我们设计了一种约束多智能体优势行动者批评家 (CMAA2C​​) 算法来训练 CAV 的安全和合作策略。通过在 CARLA 模拟器中部署的实验，我们通过在几个具有未连接危险车辆的挑战性场景中进行比较实验，验证了我们方法中设计的安全检查、时空编码器和协调机制的性能。结果表明，我们提出的方法在具有挑战性的场景中显着提高了系统的安全性和效率。 提出一种基于时空感知的约束多智能体强化学习框架，提升车联网在复杂场景中的安全性和效率。 Zhili Zhang,Songyang Han,Jiangwei Wang,Fei Miao cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Xingguang Zhong,Yue Pan,Jens Behley,Cyrill Stachniss
title: SHINE-Mapping: Large-Scale 3D Mapping Using Sparse Hierarchical Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: SHINE-Mapping：使用稀疏分层隐式神经表示的大规模 3D 映射
comment: 6+1 pages, accepted at ICRA'23
comments: 6+1 pages, accepted at ICRA'23
abstract: Accurate mapping of large-scale environments is an essential building block of most outdoor autonomous systems. Challenges of traditional mapping methods include the balance between memory consumption and mapping accuracy. This paper addresses the problem of achieving large-scale 3D reconstruction using implicit representations built from 3D LiDAR measurements. We learn and store implicit features through an octree-based, hierarchical structure, which is sparse and extensible. The implicit features can be turned into signed distance values through a shallow neural network. We leverage binary cross entropy loss to optimize the local features with the 3D measurements as supervision. Based on our implicit representation, we design an incremental mapping system with regularization to tackle the issue of forgetting in continual learning. Our experiments show that our 3D reconstructions are more accurate, complete, and memory-efficient than current state-of-the-art 3D mapping methods.
summary: Accurate mapping of large-scale environments is an essential building block of most outdoor autonomous systems. Challenges of traditional mapping methods include the balance between memory consumption and mapping accuracy. This paper addresses the problem of achieving large-scale 3D reconstruction using implicit representations built from 3D LiDAR measurements. We learn and store implicit features through an octree-based, hierarchical structure, which is sparse and extensible. The implicit features can be turned into signed distance values through a shallow neural network. We leverage binary cross entropy loss to optimize the local features with the 3D measurements as supervision. Based on our implicit representation, we design an incremental mapping system with regularization to tackle the issue of forgetting in continual learning. Our experiments show that our 3D reconstructions are more accurate, complete, and memory-efficient than current state-of-the-art 3D mapping methods.
abstract_zh: 大规模环境的精确测绘是大多数户外自主系统的重要组成部分。传统映射方法的挑战包括内存消耗和映射精度之间的平衡。本文解决了使用根据 3D LiDAR 测量构建的隐式表示实现大规模 3D 重建的问题。我们通过基于八叉树的分层结构学习和存储隐式特征，该结构是稀疏且可扩展的。隐式特征可以通过浅层神经网络转化为带符号的距离值。我们利用二元交叉熵损失来优化局部特征，并以 3D 测量作为监督。基于我们的隐式表示，我们设计了一个具有正则化的增量映射系统来解决持续学习中的遗忘问题。我们的实验表明，我们的 3D 重建比当前最先进的 3D 映射方法更准确、更完整且更节省内存。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHINE-Mapping方法，利用稀疏分层隐式神经表示实现大规模三维环境的高精度建图。
AI.motivation: 传统三维建图方法难以在内存消耗与建图精度间取得平衡，亟需更高效的解决方案以支持户外自主系统的大规模环境映射。
AI.method: 基于八叉树构建分层稀疏隐式特征结构，通过浅层神经网络将特征转换为符号距离值，采用二元交叉熵损失函数优化局部特征，并设计带正则化的增量式映射系统以解决连续学习中的遗忘问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在三维重建精度、完整性及内存效率方面均优于当前最先进的三维建图技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合分层隐式表示与正则化增量学习，本文有效解决了大规模三维环境建图中的精度与内存矛盾问题。
